weapons.name: Savage Maws and Goreslick Claws Anti- HERO (+1 Rend)

abilities.name: Stalk The Prey
abilities.flavor: Karanak's quarry is relentlessly and mercilessly run to the ground.
abilities.effect: This unit can move D6". It cannot end that move in combat unless it was in combat at the start of that move and, if there is an enemy quarry on the battlefield, it must end that move closer to the quarry .

abilities.name: Unflagging Hunters
abilities.flavor: When blood is scented, nothing will keep a Flesh Hound from its prey.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit.

weapons.name: Weapons of the Hunt Crit (2 Hits)

abilities.name: Unflagging Hunters
abilities.flavor: When blood is scented, nothing will keep a Flesh Hound from its prey.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit.

abilities.name: Pack Hunters
abilities.flavor: The howls of the Flesh Hounds sends these killers into a blood-mad frenzy.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with both this unit and a friendly Flesh Hounds unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, this unit’s combat attacks that target that enemy unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.

battleTraits.name: The Quarry
battleTraits.summary: If no enemy units are the quarry, pick an enemy unit to be the quarry (you can pick an enemy unit in reserve )
battleTraits.effect: If no enemy units are the quarry, pick an enemy unit to be the quarry (you can pick an enemy unit in reserve ).
